payload.label: microwave
payload.long_description: Close frontal view of a stainless steel countertop microwave showing a reflective dark glass door with two visible interior light reflections, a vertical black control panel on the right and a horizontal door handle; the appliance fills most of the crop and appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).
attributes: vertical black control panel on right
